metadata.title: World Clap Day - A Global Moment of Unity
metadata.description: Join the worldwide movement. World Clap Day is a global moment of human connection and celebration.

missionPage.missionP1: World Clap Day is a global event happening on August 16, 2026. At one exact coordinated moment, people all around the world will clap their hands for one second.
missionPage.missionP2: No politics. No religion. No agenda.
missionPage.missionP3: Just one simple, universal action done together.
missionPage.missionP4: It is a celebration of being alive. A reminder that beyond language, culture, or beliefs, we are human first.
missionPage.missionP5: For one second, the world moves as one.
missionPage.missionP6: The goal is not noise. The goal is unity.
missionPage.missionP7: Through the simplest action possible, we prove that billions of different people can synchronize, not because of tragedy or crisis, but simply to celebrate existence.
missionPage.visionP1: On August 16, 2026 all cities are invited.
missionPage.visionP2: In every country, people will meet in the main squares of their cities. Friends, families, strangers. Standing side by side.
missionPage.visionP3: This will be broadcast online and become real in the streets.
missionPage.visionP4: Before the synchronized clap, each city hosts its own celebration. Music. Food. Local artists. Conversations. A moment of community.
missionPage.visionP5: Then, at the exact coordinated second, everyone claps together. Not just imagining the world is connected, but knowing it is.
missionPage.visionP6: Large screens in the main squares broadcast the central live feed of the event. Cities see each other. Crowds see crowds. Continents see continents.
missionPage.visionP7: The synchronization becomes visible. Tangible. Undeniable.
missionPage.visionP8: And immediately after that one second, the silence breaks into a massive applause to celebrate humanity.
missionPage.visionP9: For what the world just proved it can do. A peaceful, voluntary, global coordination of joy.
missionPage.visionP10: This transforms the idea from a social media movement into a physical global gathering. From movement into experience.

pressPage.title: Press & Media
pressPage.forInterviews: For interviews, features and media requests:
pressPage.inTheMedia: World Clap Day in the media
pressPage.shortDescriptionText: World Clap Day is a global synchronized moment happening on 16 August 2026 at 10:00 PM New York time (EDT), when people across countries and time zones clap together for one second. No politics. No religion. No agenda. Just one simple, universal action done together.
pressPage.longDescriptionText: World Clap Day is a global event taking place on 16 August 2026 at 10:00 PM New York time (EDT). At that exact coordinated moment, people around the world will clap their hands for one second as a shared signal of unity. The initiative is non-political and non-religious, focused on one simple action done together across borders, cultures and time zones. Cities worldwide are invited to gather locally in their main squares, with community celebrations before the synchronized clap. After the one-second clap, the moment is intended to open into applause as a celebration of humanity. In 2026, World Clap Day has become one of the fastest-growing global movements, rapidly expanding across platforms and countries.
pressPage.keyFact2: Date and time: 16 August 2026, 10:00 PM New York time (EDT)
pressPage.keyFact5: One of the fastest-growing global movements in 2026
pressPage.mediaHeadline1: World Clap Day: Imagine the entire planet clapping together at once — one man's vision for 16 August 2026
pressPage.mediaHeadline2: World Clap Day Announces Global Simultaneous Clap Scheduled 16 August 2026

getInvolvedPage.title: Get Involved
getInvolvedPage.intro: There are many ways to be part of World Clap Day. Choose what fits you.
getInvolvedPage.joinTheClapText: Add the moment to your calendar, find your local clap time, and show up. One second, one world.
getInvolvedPage.supportText: Your support helps us build the platform, create media, and coordinate a truly global moment.
getInvolvedPage.partnerText: Brands, schools, universities, cities and regions — we work with organisations that share our values of unity and collective joy.
getInvolvedPage.spreadText: Share World Clap Day with friends, family and your community. Follow us on social media and help the movement grow.
getInvolvedPage.contactText: We'd love to hear from you. For partnerships, media or general inquiries:

partners.title: Partners
partners.introLine1: World Clap Day is designed as a global cultural moment.
partners.introLine2: A synchronized act of joy across cities, communities and generations.
partners.brandsP: World Clap Day is open to collaborating with brands that share our values of unity, presence and collective joy.
partners.schoolsIntro: We welcome schools and universities worldwide to be part of a synchronized global act of unity.
partners.schoolsBullet1: Record and share a short clap video. Post it on your official social media, announce your participation, mention your school or university and location, and tag World Clap Day.
partners.schoolsBullet2: Announce your participation on your website or send a short internal message to students and staff.
partners.schoolsBullet3: Send us an endorsement statement, for example: "We support the idea of World Clap Day as a global act of unity," including your institution's name and location.
partners.schoolsOutro: We will reshare your post on World Clap Day social platforms, may feature your institution on our website, and may reference your participation in media coverage.
partners.citiesP1: World Clap Day invites cities and regions worldwide to take part in a shared public moment of joy, presence and collective experience.
partners.citiesP2: Civic participation may include the designation of an appropriate public space, the coordination of a local clap moment aligned with the global timing, and the activation of civic spaces through community gatherings, music, cultural performances or other public celebrations that reflect the spirit of the day.
